settings.title: CDR Quick Release
settings.subtitle: Universal Specification Design
settings.description: The CDR Quick Release System is is designed using specifications that are widely adopted in the sim-racing industry, ensuring mechanical compatibility between various wheelbases and steering wheels. It accommodates multiple usage scenarios, allowing for rapid assembly and disassembly as well as effortless steering wheel changes.

settings.title: Automatic Locking Function
settings.description: The CDR Quick Release System is equipped with an automatic locking system. After pulling up the locking ring, there's no need to manually pull the ring when mounting the steering wheel — it's simply plug-and-play. When removing the steering wheel, just pull the ring, and it will automatically pop out.

settings.title: Reliable Signal Stability
settings.description: Integrated spring contacts ensure the system maintains exceptional electrical stability, providing reliable performance even in environments prone to electromagnetic interference (EMI). This stable connection outperforms traditional wireless solutions, guaranteeing uninterrupted operation throughout intense racing scenarios.

settings.title: Zero-Play Durability
settings.description: The optimized contact geometry eliminates wear entirely, ensuring zero-play durability even under prolonged extreme loads. This design guarantees stable performance and enhanced longevity, even after extensive use.
